---
title: "Tree Visualization"
categories:
  - model fitting
  - pre-processing
  - multivariate analysis
  - correlation
type: learn-subsection
weight: 6
description: | 
  Visualize trees.
  
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
r-packages:
  - tidymodels
  - pls
  - sessioninfo
include-after-body: ../../../html/resources.html
---

```{r}
#| label: "setup"
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
source(here::here("R/common.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: "load"
#| include: false
library(pls)
library(tidymodels)
library(sessioninfo)
pkgs <- unlist(rmarkdown::metadata[["r-packages"]])

theme_set(theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "top"))
```


## Introduction

`r article_req_pkgs(pkgs)`
Hello


## Session information {#session-info}

```{r}
#| label: "si"
#| echo: false
small_session(pkgs)
```
